title: Type Effects Studio
description: 6 live canvas typography effects — Neon, Extrude, Glitch, Sketch, Prism, Mask — with export and mouse interaction.
concept: A canvas-powered text effects playground with six distinct rendering modes. Type anything, pick an effect, tune the parameters, and move your mouse to interact with the canvas in real time. Export any frame as a PNG or randomize for instant inspiration.
features: 6 effects: Neon glow, 3D Extrude, RGB Glitch, Sketch outline, Prism aberration, Shape Mask
Mouse-interactive — position affects glow hue, extrude angle, prism direction
Click canvas to trigger glitch burst or cycle mask shape
8 color palette presets + custom text/background color pickers
Export PNG button for hi-res capture
Randomize button with 14 preset word/palette combos

interaction.mouse: Move to shift glow hue (Neon), extrude angle (Extrude), prism direction (Prism)
interaction.click: Trigger glitch burst (Glitch) or cycle mask shape (Mask)
